launch_cmd: cd /path/on/remote/repo && nohup bash run.sh > train.log 2>&1 & echo started pid $!
//secrets: `claude-ping env-sync` pushes these vars to remote_env_file (mode 600). Each value is read from your shell env, else from a local .env (see .env.example). Add any custom var name here. Leave secret_keys empty to sync EVERY key in .env instead.
//proxy: `claude-ping proxy` forwards these ports over the master. Use "PORT" for the same port both ends, or "LOCAL:REMOTE" to remap (e.g. "9000:8000").
